title: HEALTH CENTER SERVICES - 211info
text: CASCADIA TALBERT HEALTH CENTER HEALTH CENTER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers mental health counseling for individuals and families, individual and group, as well as gambling addiction counseling, primary care, and substance use disorder (SUD) services, including Adult Outpatient/Recovery day services and supportive employment. 12360 SE Sunnyside Road Clackamas, OR 97015 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5:30pm, Saturday 8:30am-2pm Intake Phone Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 303-4000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Reception (503) 303-4000 Intake (503) 674-7777 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 155-Sunnyside Services: Gambling Disorder Counseling Gambling Disorder Helplines General Medical Care Group Counseling Individual Counseling Subsidized Employment Substance Use Disorder Counseling Substance Use Disorder Day Treatment If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CASCADIA TALBERT HEALTH CENTER
